diagrams.title: Basic Computer System Architecture
diagrams.description: Shows the fundamental components of a computer system and their interconnections
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the overall structure and data flow in a computer system

diagrams.title: CPU Internal Organization
diagrams.description: Detailed view of CPU components and their relationships
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how the CPU executes instructions internally

diagrams.title: Memory Hierarchy Pyramid
diagrams.description: Visual representation of storage levels from fastest to slowest
elements: Speed Decreases, Capacity Increases from top to bottom
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the tradeoff between speed, cost, and capacity in memory design

diagrams.title: Fetch-Decode-Execute Cycle
diagrams.description: Step-by-step flow of instruction processing in the CPU
elements: Step 1: Fetch instruction from memory to IR
Step 2: Decode instruction in Control Unit
Step 3: Execute operation in ALU or transfer data
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the fundamental operation cycle of the processor
